title: 3993 BBY

|events=*[[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]]<ref name="Shadows">{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}}''</ref>
*Founding of the [[Jedi Covenant]]<ref name="KOTOR 9">[[Knights of the Old Republic 9|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 9]]</ref>}}
The following events took place in '''3993 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*During the [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] successfully [[Cleansing of Tatooine|cleanse]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] of [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]]. The Great Hunt is officially ended, but the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] secretly dispatches three Knights—[[Duron Qel-Droma]], [[Shaela Nuur]], and [[Guun Han Saresh]]—to seek out and eradicate the last of the terentateks on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].<ref name="Shadows and Light">{{Tales|23|Shadows and Light}}</ref>
*The trio's mission falls apart when Saresh, furious that Nuur and Qel-Droma are in a relationship, strikes out on his own and hunts down a terentatek on Kashyyyk. Saresh is [[Cleansing of Kashyyyk|killed]] by the terentatek, and Nuur and Qel-Droma are killed by their target in the caves of Korriban.<ref name="Shadows and Light" />
*[[Krynda Draay]], daughter of Noab Hulis and widow of [[Barrison Draay]], is roused from the depression that the Sith War put her in when she meets the Miraluka child [[Q'Anilia]]. Q'Anilia's powers of precognition impress the half-Miraluka seer, and inspires Draay to found a [[Jedi Covenant]] dedicated to preventing the rise of the Sith.<ref name="KOTOR 9" />

==Battles==
*[[Cleansing of Tatooine]]<ref name="Shadows" />
